description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this yellow sling bag from fastrack. Carry it to college for that unparalleled cool, or on a casual day out with your friends to become the talk of the town! And don't you be deceived by its compact look, for there's ample space to hold all your essentials!   Product Details Made of nylon for enhanced durability A small zippered pocket on the top to store coins Buttoned flap concealing a roomy zippered compartment and small pouches on the front Two smaller pouches in the main compartment for stashing away essentials Brand name and logo printed on the front Brand tab appliqued on the side Single adjustable shoulder strap Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
